# SubscriptionImageCreateRequest.Data

**Object**

The request body you use to create a subscription purchase image reservation.

## Declaration

```swift
object SubscriptionImageCreateRequest.Data
```

## Objects

- **SubscriptionImageCreateRequest.Data.Attributes**: Attributes that describe a subscription purchase image request resource.
- **SubscriptionImageCreateRequest.Data.Relationships**: The relationships you include in the request and those on which you can operate.
